title: Initialize .harness/ runtime substrate
description: Bootstrap the physical local database and control plane: locks/, logs/, tasks/, blackboard.json (guarded index), state.json (limits, contracts, evolution queue), bin/ CLIs (blackboard.py, lock.py), observability hooks (log_event.py, check_lock.py wired in .claude/settings.json), agent bench (.claude/agents/), harness-status skill, ORCHESTRATION.md, Gemini prompt bridge, git baseline.
acceptance_criteria: all JSON files parse; CLIs pass a scripted smoke test
hooks configured in .claude/settings.json with fail-open behavior
ORCHESTRATION.md documents the dependency-DAG delegation model
git repository initialized with a generation-0 commit
